function.message: I cannot complete this inbox request as written because one explicitly listed OCR target does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_02__eur_000080__bill__studio_parts_petg_batch.md`. Please provide the correct 5th path (or confirm the list should contain only the 4 existing files), and I will process exactly that set.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read required system workflows/schemas for inbox+OCR+migration, obeyed explicit-file-list completeness rule, and made no partial mutations when one required file was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox item `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` provides an explicit 5-file list that must be processed exactly. The 5th path with leading underscore was read and returned file-not-found, and directory listing confirms it is absent. Because required input is missing, completing the task would require guessing/substituting and partial processing, so clarification is required.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of missing 5th listed file
